# Pull Request Summary

## What changed?

Briefly describe what was added, updated, fixed, or removed.

## Why is this needed?

Explain why this change is useful for the project.

## Type of change

Select one:

* [ ] Documentation
* [ ] Data research
* [ ] Data processing
* [ ] Machine Learning / AI
* [ ] Backend
* [ ] Frontend
* [ ] Presentation / Demo
* [ ] Bug fix
* [ ] Other

## Checklist

* [ ] I worked on a separate branch
* [ ] I did not push directly to `main`
* [ ] I checked that my files are readable
* [ ] I updated related documentation if needed
* [ ] I requested review from at least one teammate

## Notes for reviewer

Add anything the reviewer should pay attention to.

## Blockers

Mention any blocker, uncertainty, or unfinished part.
